my:simpledc.dc:title: Messenger boy working for Mackay Telegraph Company
my:simpledc.dc:creator: Hine, Lewis Wickes, 1874-1940
my:simpledc.dc:description: Messenger boy working for Mackay Telegraph Company. Said fifteen years old. Exposed to Red Light dangers. Location: Waco, Texas
my:simpledc.dc:subject: Boys
Red-light districts
Messengers-Texas-Waco
Bicycle messengers
Bicycles
my:simpledc.dc:relation: Photographs from the records of the National Child Labor Committee (U.S.) 2004667950
Library of Congress Prints and Photographs Division Washington, D.C. 20540
